phases.name: Foundation -- Plugin Skeleton, State Schema, PES Engine

steps.name: Plugin skeleton and proposal state schema
criteria: Plugin installs via claude plugin install and registers
proposal-state.json created with versioned schema on /proposal new
State writes complete atomically without partial corruption
Missing state file returns helpful message, not crash
Corrupted state detected with recovery from .bak

steps.name: PES enforcement engine and hook integration
criteria: SessionStart hook runs integrity check silently
Clean state produces no PES output to user
Enforcement rules loaded from pes-config.json without code changes
Audit log records each enforcement action with timestamp
Exit code 0 allows action; exit code 1 blocks with message

phases.name: Corpus and Solicitation -- Ingestion, Parsing, Go/No-Go

steps.name: Directory-based corpus ingestion
criteria: Ingests PDF, docx, txt, md files from given directory
Reports count and type of ingested documents
Skips unsupported file types with count reported
Re-ingesting same directory adds only new files (dedup by hash)
Empty directory produces helpful message with supported formats

steps.name: Solicitation parsing and new proposal creation
criteria: Parses solicitation for topic ID, agency, phase, deadline
Searches corpus for related past work with relevance indication
Go/No-Go is a human checkpoint with go, no-go, defer options
Go decision records in state and unlocks Wave 1
Unparseable solicitation produces actionable error message

phases.name: Wave 1 Capabilities -- Status, Compliance, TPOC, Strategy

steps.name: Proposal status and reorientation
criteria: Displays current wave, progress, and deadline countdown
Shows pending async events (TPOC call) with their state
Suggests concrete next action based on current state
Shows PES deadline warning at critical threshold
Handles gracefully when no proposal exists

steps.name: Compliance matrix generation and manual editing
criteria: Extracts shall-statements, format requirements, and implicit requirements
Maps each item to proposal section; flags ambiguities
Low extraction count produces warning, not silent acceptance
User adds missed items via /proposal compliance add
Matrix is human-editable markdown written to artifacts directory

steps.name: TPOC question generation
criteria: Questions generated from ambiguities and strategic probes
Questions categorized by type and ordered by priority
Written to editable file user modifies before call
Call-never-happened is valid state that does not block progress

steps.name: TPOC answer ingestion and delta analysis
criteria: Accepts file path for call notes (text, markdown, or Word)
Matches answers to original questions; marks unanswered
Generates delta analysis comparing TPOC answers to solicitation
Updates compliance matrix with TPOC clarifications

steps.name: Strategy brief generation and Wave 1 checkpoint
criteria: Brief covers TRL, teaming, Phase III, budget, and risks
Generated even without TPOC answers (notes their absence)
Strategy alignment is human checkpoint with approve/revise/skip
Approval records in state and unlocks Wave 2 (PES-enforced)
User feedback incorporated into revised brief for re-review

phases.name: Enforcement and Compliance Check -- PES Rules, /proposal:check

steps.name: PES wave ordering enforcement
criteria: Wave 1 commands blocked when go_no_go is not 'go'
Wave 1 commands allowed when go_no_go equals 'go'
Block message explains what prerequisite is required
Enforcement rules configurable in pes-config.json

steps.name: PES session startup integrity check
criteria: Orphaned files detected and warned on startup
Clean state produces no warnings on session startup
Deadline proximity warning surfaces at configured threshold
Corrupted state triggers recovery attempt from backup

steps.name: Simplified compliance check command
criteria: Reports coverage by status: covered, partial, missing, waived
Waived items shown distinct from missing with count
Missing matrix handled gracefully with guidance to generate one
